biography: Matti, a name whispered with a mix of respect and playful exasperation on the greens, is known for his unorthodox style and, shall we say, 'spirited' approach to the game. While his home club remains a delightful mystery, his presence at any tournament is guaranteed to be memorable.
With two past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Matti has yet to clinch the coveted title or the individual Victor Trophy. However, his commitment to the sport is undeniable.

Although currently considered retired from the Hector Trophée, the possibility of a surprise return always lingers, adding an element of anticipation to future events. Whether he graces the course again or not, Matti's mark on the tournament is indelible.
